meta.title: Answering YOUR questions about Boeing's new F-47 stealth fighter
meta.description:
After more than a decade of development followed by months of uncertainty, the U.S. Air Force officially has a new air superiority fighter making its way toward service in Boeing’s F-47. 

So let’s look at some the questions you’ve asked about the F-47, and I’ll do my best to give you answers. 

Want more NGAD content? Watch some of our previous videos on it!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C9r2a84R1uo&pp=ygUNc2FuZGJveHggbmdhZA%3D%3D
